untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires multi-leg structure analysis (initial pullback, failed trend resumption, countertrend move with specific leg length relationships). This requires swing/pivot detection, leg comparison logic, and structural pattern recognition not available in the allowed indicators and operators. Specific requirements: measure pullback legs, compare leg lengths, detect failed trend resumption attempts, and validate pattern structure across timeframes. No single indicator or combination of the allowed indicators can reliably encode this three-legged pattern geometry.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using trend strength (ADX > 25 for extended trends) and price position relative to moving average. However, the core signal requires structural pattern recognition of complex multi-leg pullbacks which cannot be adequately expressed with available indicators. A proper implementation would need custom swing detection and geometric pattern matching functions.
